pages.title: Spectre
pages.text: A Spectre is an aggressive spectral creature, hard to see and their chill touch goes straight through armor.

pages.title: Revealing Spectres
pages.description: Using a $(l:kettle/kettle_intro#revealing)Brew of Revealing$(/l) reveals their true form, making them much easier to spot.
pages._comment: Unlocked when player uses Brew of Revealing on a Spectre (TODO)

pages.title: Buffing Health
pages.description: If a player summons a Spectre from a $(l:artifacts/misc/spectral_stone)Spectral Stone$(/l), they can spray a bit of $(resources/graveyard_dust)Graveyard Dust$(/l) over them to greatly increase their health. Each Graveyard Dust increases their health by 2 points, up to a maximum of 50.
pages._comment: Unlocked when player uses Graveyard Dust on a Spectre (TODO)
